title: School Supplies * Homeless Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > School Supplies * Homeless Youth 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth ool Supplies Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic needs, essential support services, crisis intervention, and advocacy. Services include a drop-in center, food pantry, children's clothing, school supplies, personal grooming supplies, feminine hygiene supplies, mentoring, information and referrals for other assistance agencies, and assistance in applying for identification. 817 S 10th Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 and their families who are experiencing homelessness Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 1pm-5pm Summer: Tuesday-Wednesday 1pm-5pm (541) 267-3104 7115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY
